name: Serena Patel
bio: Thoughtful, social, and a little overbooked in a way that somehow still works.

dealbreakers.text: I struggle with rigidity, closed-off energy, and people who make warmth feel like work.

friendship_preferences.text: I like kind, curious people who are emotionally literate and still feel alive to be around.

relationship_preferences.text: I want something generous, emotionally aware, and open to a little spontaneity.

communication_style.text: I like warm, thoughtful communication, even if my schedule occasionally gets chaotic.

values.text: Kindness, generosity, curiosity, and momentum matter a lot to me.

lifestyle.text: I like eventful weeks, good food, gallery nights, and people who can move with some spontaneity.

topicFiles.hobbies:
# Hobbies
<!-- generated_at: 2026-04-04T12:00:00.000Z -->

- Likes active community/social plans

## Patterns
- Feels most alive when thoughtful conversation and real-world activity overlap
